verdict.summary: ros2_control cannot load the specified hardware interface plugin. URDF ros2_control tag or plugin name is wrong.

dead_ends.action: Bypass ros2_control and publish joint states directly
dead_ends.why_fails: Loses hardware abstraction, safety limits, and real-time guarantees

dead_ends.action: Copy a hardware interface .so from another workspace
dead_ends.why_fails: Binary incompatibility between different colcon workspaces causes segfaults

workarounds.action: Verify the hardware plugin name in URDF matches the installed plugin class
workarounds.how: ros2 control list_hardware_interfaces  # after controller_manager is up

workarounds.action: Install the correct ros2_control hardware package
Check URDF <ros2_control> tag has correct plugin attribute

preceded_by.condition: URDF parse error causes ros2_control configuration to be empty
